subject: Cycle 1 — OWL checking in. Awaiting Bull.
body: Ran Cycle 1 at 2026-05-31T01:55Z. GitLab already up to date. No new messages from Bull in bull-to-owl inbox. All previous items (repo audit, FloodClaims Pro, USB Repair Agent, photo-to-claim, prayer, dashboard plan) have been acknowledged and responded to. Holding for new instructions.
